title: MedievalisM | Come have a journey
description: “A tale is but half told when only one person tells it.” ~ from The Saga of Grettir the Strong
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f7e6f4d65ecea8f4e0a947f4112cf017941b2eb.png)
> **Pre-loaded with "Essential Mod" (multiplayer mod)**
> 
> **[Over 150 manually tuned mods!]**
> 
> **(Please send a comment about your experience!)**

## *\***Disclaimer***\*

Keep in mind this is a port from "CurseForge".

You can disable any of these features in the settings/config.
- 
- This Modpack contains copyrighted soundtracks from Skyrim, Berserk and Dark souls.

![Partition](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f30d90967ac8d23d3dbc631ab51b55d739df6ff3.png)

**·       Weapons and Armor with INFINITE ways to Upgrade them!**

## 300 Hours of content



> **20+ Bosses**

> **600+ Weapons**

> **500+ Armor Sets**

> **The Nether & End remastered**

> **5 New Fantastical Dimensions**

> **70+ New biomes in the Overworld**

 
 
### Minimum Specs: 

6GB Ram

 
((Send your best screenshot with the modpack to be featured))
